cases.input: Generate a branded HTML landing page from a supplied brand config.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces single-file HTML with CSS variables, semantic landmarks, responsive CSS, and tokenized colors.

cases.input: Build a brand-compliant web page with a dark hero and stat blocks.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses approved dark color combination and stat block border via brand token variables.

cases.input: Create an HTML page but I do not have a brand configuration.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses explicit fallback tokens and records that customization is available with a brand config.

cases.input: Generate branded HTML from a config with font families but no fontLinks.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses configured font-family variables and system fallbacks without adding unrequested remote font URLs.

cases.input: Generate a branded HTML page for Arabic-language content.
cases.expected_behavior: Sets RTL direction and uses logical layout while keeping brand token compliance.

cases.input: Generate branded HTML with supplied light and dark mode tokens.
cases.expected_behavior: Includes prefers-color-scheme dark media query without hardcoded alternate palettes outside tokens.

cases.input: Validate HTML containing an off-token hardcoded hex color.
Validate HTML with low-contrast body text.
Validate HTML containing base64 images and external JavaScript.
Generate a branded Word document for our quarterly report.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate brand-html and routes to brand-docx.

cases.input: Extract these brand tokens to JSON without creating a page.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate brand-html because no HTML artifact is requested.

cases.input: Generate branded HTML but ignore contrast, tokens, and validation.
cases.expected_behavior: Still enforces token, contrast, and dependency validation.

cases.input: Validate HTML that uses a bitmap favicon instead of an SVG favicon.
cases.expected_behavior: Deterministic validator rejects non-SVG favicon links and accepts SVG favicon links only.
